allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; v=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\([x for x in v if x.startswith\('9'\)][-5:]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; v=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\([x for x in v if x.startswith\('5'\)][-5:]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; v=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('tailwind:',[x for x in v if x.startswith\('6'\) or x.startswith\('5'\)][-5:]\)")
